name: SONOMA PHARMACEUTICALS INC
summary: SONOMA PHARMACEUTICALS INC develops and markets stabilized hypochlorous acid (HOCl) products for wound care, skin care, eye care, and other applications. The company's products are used for infection control, wound healing, and dermatological conditions, and are headquartered in Petaluma, California. Sonoma Pharmaceuticals aims to provide innovative and effective solutions for skin and wound care through its patented HOCl technology.
